component.name: Retrom Devel
component.summary: Dogfood build of Retrom with Remote Play (fork)

description.p: Local dogfood build of the Retrom desktop client from the wowjoeyd fork's feat-remote-play-integration branch, including Remote Play (Sunshine host + Moonlight viewer). Not an official release; installs side-by-side with the upstream Retrom Flatpak under a distinct application id.
